regression_check.note: First implementation attempt (eager cross-check inside NewNodeAllocator, mirroring engine/catalog/idalloc.go exactly) broke TestLookupInternalNodeMultiKeyRouting (subtask 4.5.12.3, commit d747925, already merged/verified). Redesigned to perform the cross-check lazily inside Next() instead of at NewNodeAllocator construction time, which fully closes the same durability gap without ever touching lookup_test.go. Verified via `git diff --stat -- engine/btree/lookup_test.go` showing zero changes, and full suite green.
regression_check.TestCrashBetweenInsertAndSaveRootRecover: Passed as part of full suite run (issue #41, commit bc08c0a); not touched by this subtask.

validation_matrix_coverage: All 6 criteria in validation-matrix.json covered by TestNodeAllocatorCrossChecksExistingNodes's two subtests plus the full-suite/race runs.

scope_check.git_diff_cached_stat: engine/btree/insert.go, engine/btree/insert_test.go only (plus this run's own .cdr/runs/2026-07-11/128-implementation/* docs)
scope_check.unrelated_staged_files_found_and_unstage: none applicable -- staging performed fresh at commit time with only the two intended files plus this run's docs

known_pre_existing_unrelated_issue: go build ./engine/... at the module root fails with 'found packages btree (engine_stress_test.go) and engine (integration_test.go)' due to an untracked stray file engine/engine_stress_test.go with package btree misplaced directly under engine/. Confirmed pre-existing via `git stash` + rebuild on unmodified tree; not caused by, or related to, this subtask's change. Not fixed here (out of scope).
